INSERT INTO posts (caption, image_url, platform, status, scheduled_at, post_type) VALUES
('🌮 IT''S TACO TUESDAY! 🌮 Come celebrate the best day of the week with us at Sopris Restaurant! Fresh, handcrafted tacos made with love — carne asada, birria, chicken, and more. ('🌮 TACO TUESDAY IS HERE AGAIN! 🌮 Your weekly reminder that the best tacos in Jackpot are waiting for you at Sopris Restaurant. Carne asada, birria, chicken — made fresh, made with love, every single Tuesday. See you inside 4 Jacks Casino! 🎊 #TacoTuesday #SoprisRestaurant #JackpotNV #Tacos #MexicanFood #WeeklySpecial #TacoLife #CasinoEats', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/sopris_event_taco_tuesday-Y54jFF7aAsqdQSk6dibSfa.png', 'both', 'scheduled', 1774983600000, 'event'),

Every Tuesday inside 4 Jacks Casino, Jackpot NV. 🎉 #TacoTuesday #MartesDeTacos #SoprisRestaurant #JackpotNV #AuthenticMexican #Tacos #CasinoEats', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/sopris_event_taco_tuesday-Y54jFF7aAsqdQSk6dibSfa.png', 'both', 'scheduled', 1775588400000, 'event'),
('🌮 TACO TUESDAY REMINDER! 🌮 Drop what you''re doing — it''s Taco Tuesday at Sopris Restaurant! Fresh carne asada, birria, and chicken tacos are calling your name. -- BBB Grand Opening announcement (Mon Apr 13)
('🎉 BIG NEWS, JACKPOT! 🎉 We are thrilled to announce the GRAND OPENING of Border Boost & Brew — our brand new coffee shop inside 4 Jacks Casino! 🚀 Join us April 18-20 for our 4/20 Weekend Grand Opening celebration! Espresso drinks, cold brew, energy drinks, smoothies, and more. Come boost your day the right way! ☕ Stay tuned for more details all week. #GrandOpening #BorderBoostAndBrew #BBB #JackpotNV #CoffeeShop #4JacksCasino #ComingSoon', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/sopris_event_bbb_grand_opening-5Bg9LtP3tWW8hUFyWKGnQ9.png', 'both', 'scheduled', 1776106800000, 'event'),

-- BBB Grand Opening Day 1 (Sat Apr 18)
('☕ IT''S HERE! Border Boost & Brew is OFFICIALLY OPEN! 🎊 Come celebrate our Grand Opening this weekend — April 18-20! Handcrafted espresso drinks, cold brew, energy drinks, smoothies, and specialty beverages. We''re inside 4 Jacks Casino in Jackpot, NV and we cannot wait to serve you! Come boost your day! ⚡ #GrandOpening #BorderBoostAndBrew #JackpotNV #CoffeeShop #ColdBrew #EnergyDrinks #4JacksCasino #420Weekend', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/sopris_event_bbb_grand_opening-5Bg9LtP3tWW8hUFyWKGnQ9.png', 'both', 'scheduled', 1776538800000, 'event'),

-- BBB Grand Opening Day 2 (Sun Apr 19)
('☕ DAY 2 of the Border Boost & Brew Grand Opening! 🎉 We had an incredible first day and we''re just getting started! Come see us today — Sunday April 19 — inside 4 Jacks Casino, Jackpot NV. Espresso, cold brew, energy drinks, smoothies and more. Thank you to everyone who came out yesterday! We love this community! ❤️ #BorderBoostAndBrew #GrandOpening #JackpotNV #CoffeeShop #ThankYou #420Weekend', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/sopris_event_bbb_grand_opening-5Bg9LtP3tWW8hUFyWKGnQ9.png', 'both', 'scheduled', 1776625200000, 'event'),

('🌿 4/20 WEEKEND IS ALMOST HERE! 🌿 Sopris Restaurant AND Border Boost & Brew are rolling out special promotions all weekend long — April 18-20 in Jackpot, NV! 🌮 Sopris: Special food deals all weekend ☕ Border Boost & Brew: Grand Opening specials Save this post and come see us inside 4 Jacks Casino! ('🌿 HAPPY 4/20! 🌿 Today is the LAST DAY of our 4/20 Weekend Specials at Sopris Restaurant and Border Boost & Brew! Don''t miss out — come see us inside 4 Jacks Casino, Jackpot NV today! 🌮 Sopris Restaurant: Special weekend deals ☕ Border Boost & Brew: Grand Opening specials still going!
